name: Creamed Eggs with Scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat enough peanut oil in a clean, well-seasoned wok to coat the sides of the pan.
2. Meanwhile, mix eggs, sour cream, and dill.
3. When the oil is hot, toss in half the scallions and cook until tender.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and lift the eggs from the middle with a gentle scooping motion until they are completely cooked.
5. Garnish with the remaining scallions.
